label: TIER 1 — Display DT
tagline: See your building as a Digital Twin
ui_hint: Line chart (daily/hourly toggle) | KPI cards (avg consumption, peak, baseline) | Building info panel | Meter type donut chart

label: TIER 2 — Rules DT
tagline: We understand how your building behaves
ui_hint: Alert cards with severity badges (red/amber/green) | Rule evaluation table | 'Why is this happening?' explanation panel | Recommendations list

label: TIER 3 — Stats DT
tagline: We quantify and predict your energy usage
ui_hint: Model leaderboard table | Actual vs Predicted line chart | Feature importance bar chart | Metric scorecard (RMSE gauge) | Forecast horizon slider

label: TIER 4 — Causal DT
tagline: We explain WHY and simulate the impact of change
data_keys: XGBoost model (feature perturbation) | Rule engine (threshold sensitivity) | Summary stats (cost-per-kWh baseline)
ui_hint: Slider controls (temperature setpoint, occupancy hours, schedule shift) | Before/After energy chart | Projected savings banner | ROI timeline
